Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}I don't detect any more Shadows on this floor... That figure's disappeared, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}There's a lot that still concerns me, but for now—good job, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}That was our first encounter with a tough enemy... Do you think we'll be able to progress at our current strength?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}It's reassuring to see you so confident.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5119 0 0}But you did take down a strong foe just now without any major issue. Isn't that something to be proud of?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}I'll also be providing you with navigational assistance. The going might be tough, but let's do the best we can![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5138 0 0}We managed to take down that tough enemy. Do you think we should head back now, or keep going?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Now that we've secured a supply route, we should be clear to proceed so long as we stay cautious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}All right. No good will come of pushing ourselves too hard, I suppose. Let's resume once we're ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}Okay, then. Let's try to keep riding this momentum.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Whatever you decide, Aigis, I'll be here to help. You can count on me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5010 0 0}Phew, looks like the coast is clear. Now we'll be able to progress. Great job, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Your orders were spot-on. Impressive strategy, as always.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_011_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I still have a lot to learn.

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5032 0 0}Oh, no, I'm the one who ought to be thanking you![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Hehe, that was a very Aigis response, though.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5131 0 0}Hehe, I should've known you'd say that. You're so humble, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}I'm just a little flustered, is all. But thank you, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}Well, now that the enemy's down, shall we press on? I'm detecting some stairs nearby. Should we look for them?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}If that figure is the one calling the Shadows, then that means it intends to stop us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Does that make it our enemy...? What do you think, Aigis?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}That'd be the logical conclusion... But what is it after?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5067 0 0}Right... What we see here may reflect our inner thoughts, was it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}At least, that's what Metis said, if I recall correctly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}That's fair... We don't have enough information to go off of, anyway.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I just get worried so easily. It's a bad habit of mine.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Right now, let's focus on pursuing that figure since it got away.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5086 0 0}Well, we managed to drive back the enemy. Do you feel like we've gotten back up to speed, combat-wise?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}It seemed like you all were struggling a bit when you first started fighting again. I was a little worried.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5094 0 0}Really...? Well, I guess you were fighting pretty frequently back then. It may take a while to regain that lost experience.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}I think the fighting's only going to get more intense. Let's make sure we're all prepared before we keep going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5138 0 0}The enemy's gone down. Well done, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 0 0 0}That figure disappeared sometime during the battle, though. It's like it doesn't want to fight...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}Is that even possible...? For a Shadow to dislike fighting?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}Yeah, maybe. We don't know enough about Shadows to rule it out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5028 0 0}You're right. Maybe it's just observing us for now, only to attack us later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}There's still so much for us to learn...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}But now's not the time to dwell on that, is it? Let's get going, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5010 0 0}We'll be able to make more progress now. Great work, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Well, now that we've taken down the enemy, what should we do next? Keep going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}All right then! No objections here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5025 0 0}All right then. Remember, taking breaks is important.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}If you're not sure, maybe we should head back and prep before setting out. Better safe than sorry, don't you think?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}You can count on me to navigate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5001 0 0}Nicely done, Aigis. These fights are really tough...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_039_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}It doesn't seem that way to me.

Dialog.name: MSG_040_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Hehe, I was starting to get a little worried, but you just made me feel so much better.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}You really are something, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Perhaps we need to spend some time training on the upper floors to improve our combat capabilities.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I know our priority is to make progress, but it's something to consider.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_042_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5086 0 0}You did great in that last battle, Aigis. Now we can move on.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Oh, as for the things I'm looking into...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Well, I haven't made much progress on that front... Sorry, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5090 0 0}Yes, it really is... I'm disappointed in myself as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Just a little longer, and this will all be over... Soon, we'll be able to understand what's happening.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 2 52 50 0 0}I'll work even harder than before. Keep up the good work, Aigis![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_047_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5138 0 0}Nicely done in that last battle, Aigis. How are you faring?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5109 0 0}Hehe, good to hear. Remember not to push yourself too hard, though. Okay?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}Now let's get moving. We need to catch up with that figure.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5116 0 0}Yeah, I'm sure... That was a really tough fight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}There's that figure, too... Perhaps we should consider heading back to heal up before we keep going.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5108 0 0}Hehe, I could tell. I knew you had it in you, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}We have to catch up to that figure though, so we'll have to press on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_052_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5072 0 0}Oh, sorry, I didn't mean to overstep! It's your call whether we keep going or head back, Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Anyway, you're doing great![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}Hey, Aigis... Now that the fighting's over, could we talk for a moment?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}Do you think we might... have an encounter that we never thought possible?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 52 50 0 0}Well... I suppose you never know what might happen when it comes to Personas and Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Ah... Yeah, I guess that would be the logical conclusion...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5098 0 0}Um, I don't think that really answers my question...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Hehe, you're right, though. We'll cross that bridge when we get to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5057 0 0}Sorry, it's just... a lot's happened since we've come here, so I've been overthinking things.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Well, it's back to navigating for me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 10 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5077 0 0}After taking down those Shadows... the end can't be too far now.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}I'm honestly a little scared of what's waiting for us... Everything I imagine is downright terrible.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_060_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Everything will be fine, I know it.

Dialog.name: MSG_061_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}I see... But we still have each other.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}No, you're right. Everything's going to be just fine...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_063_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5042 0 0}I'm glad I got to talk to you about this. It's helped me calm down a bit.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 52 50 0 0}Okay... Should we get going?[n]{f 1 1}
